title: Keep agent invocation deterministic and inspectable
description: Make every INGEST workflow discoverable and safely automatable without prose parsing, prompts, or background processes.
target: 100% of public operations publish machine-readable input/result/error schemas and stable exit categories; every invocation returns exactly one stdout business envelope; expected failures contain no stack trace; no operation requires an interactive prompt, watcher, daemon, network call, or source reread for status and resume.
load_condition: All public operations across success, validation, blocked, unsupported, compatibility, resource, interruption, and cleanup outcomes.
measurement: Published-binary schema snapshots, stdout/stderr cardinality assertions, exit-code matrix, process-lifecycle tests, offline tests, and no-orphan-process checks.
rationale: The AI Agent Host is the primary operational client and needs a stable machine contract rather than a human-only CLI.
